cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Tiffany could have gone to the market. The key here is to look at her schedule based on what the other people saw her doing and see when she was free. First, she woke up at 6am. Then Sarah saw her at the library from 6am to 9am. So that's morning time. After that, Betty saw her driving to the water park from 9am to 10am. So that's the late morning to early afternoon. Then there's a time after 10am. The next person is Linda, who saw her buying a phone from 12pm to 6pm. So that's noon to 6pm. Then Mary saw her at the gym from 6pm to 10pm. The market is closed after 10pm, so she has to go before that. So let's map out
